channel.title: FilmyChill — New Movies & OTT Releases This Week in Germany
channel.description: What's worth watching this week in Germany — new theatre and OTT releases with ratings and verdicts. Updated twice daily.

item.title: Lee Cronin's The Mummy — HBO Max
item.description: HBO Max · English · ★ 8.0 · Must watch — The young daughter of a journalist disappears into the desert without a trace—eight years later, the broken family is shocked when she is returned to them, as…

item.title: Home Stories — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · German · Just released — verdict soon — As a contestant in a singing casting show, Lea is asked by the TV team who she is and what makes her special.

item.title: The Boys — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · English · ★ 8.4 · Must watch — A group of vigilantes known informally as “The Boys” set out to take down corrupt superheroes with no more than blue-collar grit and a willingness to fight…

item.title: Hijamat — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · German · Just released — verdict soon — Fifty-year-old Murad’s life is shaken to the core when he learns that his younger brother is gay.

item.title: The Sheep Detectives — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · English · ★ 7.9 · Must watch — George Hardy is a shepherd who reads detective novels to his beloved sheep every night, assuming they can't possibly understand.

item.title: Evil Dead Burn — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.0 · Worth a watch — After her husband's abrupt death, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws. As they transform into Deadites one by one, she comes to discover that the vows she…

item.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Japanese · ★ 8.5 · Must watch — When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every…

item.title: Die Landarztpraxis – Team Sonnenhof — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · German · Not enough ratings yet

item.title: Simpsley — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 8.0 · Must watch — When penniless con-artist Marge Bouvier is sent to Italy to convince wealthy sap Seymour Skinner to come home, she’s tempted by the trappings of his affluent…

item.title: 23 000 Lives — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · German · Not enough ratings yet — Unable to stand by and watch as countless refugees lose their lives attempting to reach Europe by sea, a group of young Berliners take action.

item.title: Silo — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · English · ★ 8.2 · Must watch — In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously,…

item.title: X-Men '97 — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · English · ★ 8.6 · Must watch — The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a…

item.title: Bad Boyfriends - Jetzt wird abgerechnet — RTL+
item.description: RTL+ · German · Not enough ratings yet

item.title: The Bear — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · English · ★ 8.1 · Must watch — Carmy, a young fine-dining chef, comes home to Chicago to run his family sandwich shop. As he fights to transform the shop and himself, he works alongside a…

item.title: Minions & Monsters — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.4 · Decent one-time watch — This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters…

item.title: House of the Dragon — WOW
item.description: WOW · English · ★ 8.4 · Must watch — The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights.

item.title: Obsession — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 8.3 · Must watch — After breaking the mysterious "One Wish Willow" to win his crush's heart, a hopeless romantic finds himself getting exactly what he asked for but soon…
